behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names SDKs.php, the methods (updateSdkVersion, pushToGit, updateExistingPr, cleanupTarget), the version string 1.9.x, the existingPrUrl parameter, and the Throwable catch requirement.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to fix conceptually without prescribing exact code edits or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_updateSdkVersion_uses_block_scoping requires nested callback with if/switch inside, and test_block_scoped_version_update_logic enforces specific nesting structure — a valid alternative fix using a single regex with explicit block boundaries or different scoping approach would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests (test_supported_versions_includes_1_9_x, test_updateSdkVersion_uses_block_scoping, test_empty_git_commit_handling, test_updateExistingPr_*, test_cleanupTarget_*, test_console_output_formatting_improved) inspect source text via regex/strpos rather than executing the modified code.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each test requires specific code changes (adding 1.9.x, removing cleanupTarget, adding catch Throwable, etc.) that a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All six issues from instruction.md are covered by corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are individually named with docstrings describing each behavioral aspect.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task doesn't produce structured data outputs.

no_typos.reason: Paths, method names, and parameters are consistent throughout.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies the file to modify as part of the task scope but does not specify line numbers.
